prompt: A high-quality cinematic portrait in a 9:16 vertical aspect ratio showing Sam Altman standing in the left foreground outdoors in front of a traditional ornate dark wood Chinese-style building with intricate green lattice windows and carved architectural details. He faces the camera and wears a black zip-up jacket with a clearly visible white OpenAI logo on the chest. His arm is extended toward the viewer, holding 1 cigarette extremely close to the lens in the lower-left foreground, making the cigarette and hand large, soft, and out of focus with strong depth-of-field blur. Slightly behind him on the right stands Elon Musk, looking at the camera while holding 1 cigarette near his mouth, wearing a black T-shirt with a white xAI logo on the chest, with his other hand tucked into a pocket. Use warm golden-hour sunlight from the side, creating sharp shadows, realistic skin texture, high contrast, and a moody amber tone across the faces, clothing, and wooden facade. The composition should feel candid but polished, tightly cropped from about mid-thigh upward, with the foreground figure dominating the frame and the second figure partially overlapped behind him. Emphasize realistic photography, cinematic color grading, shallow depth of field, natural facial proportions, subtle smoke mood, and crisp branding details on the OpenAI jacket and xAI shirt.
